summary: A Fox News morning segment ('Fox & Friends' / 'Happening Today') previewing Secretary Noem's tour of El Salvador's CECOT prison, with the chyron 'DHS SEC NOEM TOURS EL SALVADOR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED MIGRANT GANG SUSPECTS.' It mixes prison B-roll of shaved-head detainees and masked guards, a Washington correspondent stand-up, and the Fox & Friends couch panel. This is a straight cable-news report, not a music-driven or stylized production, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: TODAY: SECRETARY NOEM TOURS PRISON IN EL SALVADOR
DHS SEC NOEM TOURS EL SALVADOR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED MIGRANT GANG SUSPECTS
